description: Austin Federa discusses the development of a new high-performance Internet infrastructure designed for distributed systems, emphasizing the need for a dedicated network layer that addresses the limitations of the public Internet, particularly for blockchain applications.
topic_summary: In this segment, Austin Federa introduces the Double Zero network, a purpose-built infrastructure aimed at enhancing performance for distributed systems. He highlights the challenges of the current Internet, including latency and variability, and presents the N1 network layer as a solution for high-performance applications [t=2:48-281:08].
